description: Agentic QA system for NexusAI — AI model aggregation platform

agents.name: orchestrator-agent
agents.description: Master QA coordinator. Runs all agents in sequence, aggregates results, produces final report.

agents.name: test-case-generator-agent
agents.description: Generates functional, negative, boundary, and security test cases from source code.

agents.name: api-testing-agent
agents.description: Executes automated API tests against live backend endpoints.

agents.name: bug-detection-agent
agents.description: Analyzes test results and logs to detect, classify, and document bugs.

agents.name: regression-testing-agent
agents.description: Validates fixes and ensures no regressions after changes.

agents.name: observability-agent
agents.description: Audits logging, metrics, and tracing coverage. Detects silent failures.

skills.name: generate-test-cases
skills.description: Generate functional, negative, boundary, and security test cases

skills.name: run-api-suite
skills.description: Execute automated API test suite against live backend

skills.name: detect-bugs
skills.description: Detect and reproduce bugs from test results and logs

skills.name: edge-case-discovery
skills.description: Discover hidden edge cases and unusual system behaviors

skills.name: failure-injection
skills.description: Simulate database downtime, API timeouts, and token failures

skills.name: performance-test
skills.description: Design and run k6 load tests for NexusAI endpoints

skills.name: observability-check
skills.description: Audit logging, metrics, and tracing coverage

skills.name: orchestrate-qa
skills.description: Run the full QA pipeline and produce a final report
